fato_historico: 1981: A Canadair CL-44 and Sukhoi Su-15 collide in mid-air near Yerevan, Armenia, killing four.
energia_do_dia: Today brings a celestial reminder that paths may cross unexpectedly in the vast blue sky. Just as separate trajectories find harmony in the horizon, consider how your unique journey connects with others. It is a good time to release past frictions, trusting that every meeting, no matter how fleeting or sudden, carries a hidden lesson for your growth.
frase_do_dia: Let your spirit soar high, finding beauty in the vastness of the open air.
significado_numero: A powerful cycle signifying the manifestation of inner wisdom and humanitarian grace.
conselho: Keep your vision clear and remain open to the magic of surprise connections.
